Avast! Belay the port jib, and scupper the mains 'l on the poop deck!
In the free software market Microsoft faces competition from many others including AVG, Alwil Avast, Avira Antivir and Comodo.
If you want to beef up security on your Android device then I suggest you grab the avast!
